subcodes.first_line: In all times hath the Pen of the Most Merciful wisely enjoined the birds soaring in the atmosphere of divine knowledge, lest any matter should arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع احیان قلم رحمن طائران هوای عرفان را بحکمت امر فرموده تا امری احداث
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God
